page.title: Social Media
page.emptyState: No Instagram account connected yet. Add an account to track followers, reach, and other metrics.

addToken.heading: Add access token
addToken.description: Without an access token, no data can be synced. Add it here to load followers, reach, and other metrics.
addToken.placeholder: Long-lived access token from the Meta Developer Portal

addModal.title: Connect Instagram account
addModal.accessTokenPlaceholder: Long-lived access token from the Meta Developer Portal – can be added later too
addModal.accessTokenHint: Without a token, the account can be created but not synced. You can add the token anytime on the account page.

instructions.heading: Here's how to find this information:
instructions.step1: Create an app in the Meta Developer Portal and add the "Instagram Graph API" product.
instructions.step2: Connect your Instagram account (Business/Creator) to a Facebook page.
instructions.step3: Generate an access token in the Graph API Explorer with the permissions
instructions.step4: Convert it into a long-lived token (valid for 60 days).
instructions.step5Pre: You can get the Instagram User ID via
